pi_items.source: Verified from setup_task.sh (line 7), export_result.sh (line 6), and README.md (line 15); consistent across all files
Task description explicitly states: 'You are a literacy specialist at Oakwood Unified School District' and README.md line 5 confirms 'Occupation: Literacy Specialist / Kindergarten Teacher'

Verified from README.md (lines 16-18) and official GCompris activities. GCompris ActivityInfo.qml files show activities tagged with section keywords including 'reading letters' (click_on_letter), 'computer keyboard reading words' (wordsgame), and 'reading vocabulary' (babymatch). These activity keywords align with the required section names.
Confirmed in README.md (line 24: 'Be at least 400 bytes') and verifier.py (line 76: 'if size >= 400'); consistent across all files

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating a reading readiness assessment report at /home/ga/Desktop/reading_readiness_report.txt. The task is set in the role of a literacy specialist evaluating GCompris (a real, open-source educational software suite with 190+ activities) for kindergarten readiness. The report must be at least 400 bytes and include labeled sections for Letters, Words, and Vocabulary. GCompris reading section contains verified activities tagged with these keyword categories: letter-focused activities (Baby keyboard/My first keyboard, Click on a lowercase letter, Click on an uppercase letter, Alphabet sequence, Draw letters), word-focused activities (Falling words, Wordsgame), and vocabulary activities (Babymatch). The task is fictional role-play set at 'Oakwood Unified School District,' which does not appear to exist as a real district with that exact name.
